var-cluster-001.name: cluster
var-cluster-001.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'source', 'cluster_name') AS cluster FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE position(body, '"flow"') > 0 AND cluster != '' GROUP BY cluster ORDER BY cluster

var-ns-001.name: ns
var-ns-001.queryValue: SELECT ns FROM (SELECT JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'source', 'namespace') AS ns FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE position(body, '"flow"') > 0 UNION ALL SELECT JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'destination', 'namespace') AS ns FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE position(body, '"flow"') > 0) WHERE ns != '' GROUP BY ns ORDER BY ns

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT count() AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE timestamp > toUnixTimestamp64Nano(now64()) - 86400000000000 AND position(body, '"flow"') > 0 AND (JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'source', 'cluster_name') IN $cluster) AND (JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'source', 'namespace') IN $ns OR JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'destination', 'namespace') IN $ns) AND upper(JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'verdict')) = 'FORWARDED'

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT count() AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE timestamp > toUnixTimestamp64Nano(now64()) - 86400000000000 AND position(body, '"flow"') > 0 AND (JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'source', 'cluster_name') IN $cluster) AND (JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'source', 'namespace') IN $ns OR JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'destination', 'namespace') IN $ns) AND upper(JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'verdict')) = 'DROPPED'

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT count() AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE timestamp > toUnixTimestamp64Nano(now64()) - 86400000000000 AND position(body, '"flow"') > 0 AND (JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'source', 'cluster_name') IN $cluster) AND (JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'source', 'namespace') IN $ns OR JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'destination', 'namespace') IN $ns) AND upper(JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'verdict')) = 'AUDIT'

widgets.description: Logs-backed Hubble flow table with IP, port, type, and latency.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    upper(JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'verdict')) AS verdict,
    JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'source', 'cluster_name') AS cluster,
    JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'source', 'namespace') AS source_namespace,
    JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'destination', 'namespace') AS destination_namespace,
    JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'source', 'pod_name') AS source_pod,
    JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'destination', 'pod_name') AS destination_pod,
    JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'traffic_direction') AS traffic_direction,
    JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'IP', 'source') AS source_ip,
    JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'IP', 'destination') AS destination_ip,
    coalesce(
      toString(JSONExtractUInt(body, 'flow', 'l4', 'TCP', 'destination_port')),
      toString(JSONExtractUInt(body, 'flow', 'l4', 'UDP', 'destination_port')),
      ''
    ) AS destination_port,
    JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'Type') AS type,
    if(
      greatest(
        JSONExtractUInt(body, 'flow', 'latency_ns'),
        JSONExtractUInt(body, 'flow', 'l7', 'latency_ns'),
        JSONExtractUInt(body, 'flow', 'trace_context', 'latency_ns')
      ) > toUInt64(60000000000),
      toUInt64(0),
      greatest(
        JSONExtractUInt(body, 'flow', 'latency_ns'),
        JSONExtractUInt(body, 'flow', 'l7', 'latency_ns'),
        JSONExtractUInt(body, 'flow', 'trace_context', 'latency_ns')
      )
    ) AS raw_latency_ns,
    toUInt8(JSONExtractBool(body, 'flow', 'is_reply')) AS is_reply,
    toUInt64(JSONExtractUInt(body, 'flow', 'l4', 'TCP', 'source_port')) AS src_port,
    toUInt64(JSONExtractUInt(body, 'flow', 'l4', 'TCP', 'destination_port')) AS dst_port
  FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2
  WHERE timestamp > toUnixTimestamp64Nano(now64()) - 86400000000000
    AND position(body, '"flow"') > 0
    AND (JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'source', 'cluster_name') IN $cluster)
    AND (
      JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'source', 'namespace') IN $ns
      OR JSONExtractString(body, 'flow', 'destination', 'namespace') IN $ns
    )
)
SELECT
  formatDateTime(fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp), '%H:%i:%S %d:%m:%Y', 'Europe/Minsk') AS time,
  verdict,
  cluster,
  source_namespace,
  destination_namespace,
  source_pod,
  destination_pod,
  traffic_direction,
  source_ip,
  destination_ip,
  destination_port,
  type,
  if(
    raw_latency_ns > 0,
    raw_latency_ns,
    if(
      is_reply = 1 AND src_port > 0 AND dst_port > 0,
      toUInt64(greatest(
        timestamp - coalesce((
          SELECT max(b2.timestamp)
          FROM base AS b2
          WHERE b2.is_reply = 0
            AND b2.source_ip = base.destination_ip
            AND b2.destination_ip = base.source_ip
            AND b2.src_port = base.dst_port
            AND b2.dst_port = base.src_port
            AND b2.timestamp <= base.timestamp
            AND b2.timestamp >= base.timestamp - 5000000000
        ), timestamp),
        toInt64(0)
      )),
      toUInt64(0)
    )
  ) AS latency_ns,
  if(
    raw_latency_ns > 0,
    'native',
    if(
      is_reply = 1 AND src_port > 0 AND dst_port > 0,
      'derived_tcp_reply',
      'missing'
    )
  ) AS latency_status
FROM base
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Hubble Flows (IP + Port + Type + Latency)
